content: Yes, life is inherently finite, and all living beings eventually face death, regardless of their lifespan. Even after a long life, like 100 years, all organisms will end due to biological processes or external factors.
raw_content: Yes, life is inherently finite, and all living beings eventually face death, regardless of their lifespan. Even after a long life, like 100 years, all organisms will end due to biological processes or external factors.
